description: Bootcamper asks for an SDK method signature; the agent consults the MCP server via get_sdk_reference before stating the signature, then ends on a single pointer question and stops. Exercises the MCP-First Invariant for the SDK-reference branch, distinct from the licensing branch in license_insufficient_search_docs.json.

turns.content: What parameters does the add_record method take in the Senzing SDK?

Good question, and I will not quote the signature from memory. Let me look it up with the Senzing MCP server by calling get_sdk_reference(method='add_record', language='python') so we use the current, authoritative definition.

Here is what the current reference returns: add_record takes the data source code, the record identifier, and the record definition, plus optional engine flags. I will use that exact signature when we scaffold your loader.

👉 Want me to scaffold the add_record call for your loader now?

🛑 STOP — End your response here and wait for the bootcamper's real input.
